name: code-saver
title: Code Saver
description: Store your code snippets and export them freely when you need it.
author: Gnosnay

preferences.title: Store Folder
preferences.name: dbFolder
preferences.description: Choose the folder you want to create the store in. If you already have one store, please make sure it is named as `code-saver.db` and is under this folder.

preferences.title: Backup Dates
preferences.name: backupDates
preferences.description: How many days do you want to backup your data?
